---
title: "05-roc_curve_auc"
output: 
  html_notebook:
    toc: true
---

```{r, warning=F}


library(dplyr)
library(magrittr)
library(pROC)
library(ggplot2)






# 5.1. Import metadata & preds


data_dir <- "C:/Users/User/Documents/UCSF/BREATH2.Gene/data"
results_dir <- "C:/Users/User/Documents/UCSF/BREATH2.Gene/results"

# Import fold assignments
metadata_df_with_folds <- read.csv(
  file.path(data_dir, "metadata_df_with_folds.csv"),
  stringsAsFactors=F)

# Import out-of-fold predictions
lassoRF_preds_gene <- read.csv(
  file.path(results_dir, "lassoRF_preds.csv"),
  stringsAsFactors=F)

# Import protein preds
lassoRF_preds_prot <- read.csv(
  file.path(
  "C:/Users/User/Documents/UCSF/BREATH2.Prot/results/lassoRF_preds.csv"),
  stringsAsFactors=F)

# Ensure consistent factor levels
lassoRF_preds_gene$LRTI_adjudication <- factor(
  lassoRF_preds_gene$LRTI_adjudication,
  levels = c("No Evidence", "Definite"))

# Merge
merged_preds <- lassoRF_preds_gene %>%
  dplyr::inner_join(metadata_df_with_folds %>% 
  dplyr::select(sample_name, fold),
    by = "sample_name")






# 5.2. Per-fold AUC


output_auc_roc <- function(preds_df, output_suffix) {

  # Compute per-fold AUC
  auc_df <- preds_df %>%
    group_by(fold) %>%
    summarize({
    roc_obj <- pROC::roc(
    response  = factor(LRTI_adjudication, levels = c("No Evidence", "Definite")),
    predictor = pred,
    direction = "<"
  )
  ci_vals <- pROC::ci.auc(roc_obj, conf.level = 0.95)
  tibble(
    auc = as.numeric(roc_obj$auc),
    auc_lower = ci_vals[1],
    auc_upper = ci_vals[3]
    )
  }, .groups = "drop")

  # Determine number of folds
  max_fold <- max(auc_df$fold)

  # Create ROC PDF (all folds overlayed)
  pdf(file.path(results_dir, paste0("ROC_", output_suffix, ".pdf")))

  for (i in 1:max_fold) {
    fold_data <- preds_df %>% filter(fold == i)

    roc_obj <- pROC::roc(
      response  = factor(fold_data$LRTI_adjudication,
        levels = c("No Evidence", "Definite")),
      predictor = fold_data$pred,
      direction = "<"
    )

    plot(roc_obj, add = (i != 1), col = i)
  }

  dev.off()

  # Save per-fold AUC CSV at the very end
  write.csv(
    auc_df,
    file.path(results_dir, paste0("cv_auc_", output_suffix, ".csv")),
    row.names=F)

  return(auc_df)
}






# 5.3. Plot Graph


# Run AUC computation
auc_lassoRF <- output_auc_roc(merged_preds, "lassoRF")

max_fold <- max(auc_lassoRF$fold)

# Open empty plot for overlay with top-left orientation
plot(0, 0, type = "n",
     xlim = c(1, 0), ylim = c(0, 1),
     xlab = "Specificity", ylab = "Sensitivity",
     main = "ROC Curves by Fold")

# Add diagonal reference
lines(x = c(1, 0), y = c(0, 1), lty = 2, col = "gray")

for (i in 1:max_fold) {
  fold_data <- merged_preds %>% filter(fold == i)

  roc_obj <- pROC::roc(
    response  = factor(fold_data$LRTI_adjudication,
      levels = c("No Evidence", "Definite")),
    predictor = fold_data$pred,
    direction = "<"
  )

  # Plot specificity directly: axis direction flips via xlim
  lines(roc_obj$specificities, roc_obj$sensitivities, col = i, lwd = 2)
}

legend("bottomright", legend = paste("Fold", 1:max_fold), col = 1:max_fold, lwd = 2)






# 5.4. Summaries


# DeLong 95% CI for overall ROC
ci_auc <- pROC::ci.auc(
  pROC::roc(
    response = factor(merged_preds$LRTI_adjudication, 
    levels = c("No Evidence", "Definite")),
    predictor = merged_preds$pred,
    direction = "<"
  ),
  conf.level = 0.95
)

mean_auc <- as.numeric(ci_auc[2])
lower_auc <- ci_auc[1]
upper_auc <- ci_auc[3]

message(
  "AUC summary: ",
  round(mean_auc, 3),
  " (95% CI: ",
  round(lower_auc, 3),
  "–",
  round(upper_auc, 3),
  ")"
)

print(auc_lassoRF)






# 5.5. Gene / Protein adjudication plot


# Combine rf_preds for gene and prot into one data frame
combined_preds <- metadata_df_with_folds %>%
  dplyr::select(sample_name, patient_id) %>%
  inner_join(lassoRF_preds_gene, by = "sample_name") %>%
  inner_join(
    lassoRF_preds_prot %>%
      dplyr::select(patient_id, pred_prot = pred),
    by = "patient_id"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::rename(pred_gene = pred) %>%
  dplyr::select(sample_name, patient_id, LRTI_adjudication, pred_gene, pred_prot)






# 5.5a. Plot

combined_preds <- combined_preds %>%
  mutate(
    switched = (pred_gene >= 0.5) != (pred_prot >= 0.5),
    LRTI_adjudication = factor(LRTI_adjudication, levels = c("Definite", "No Evidence"))
  )

ggplot(combined_preds) +
  # Non-switcher lines
  geom_segment(
    data = combined_preds %>% filter(!switched),
    aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = pred_gene, yend = pred_prot),
    color = "grey82", linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  # Switcher lines
  geom_segment(
    data = combined_preds %>% filter(switched),
    aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = pred_gene, yend = pred_prot),
    color = "grey40", linewidth = 1
  ) +
  # Gene dots
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 1, y = pred_gene, color = LRTI_adjudication),
    size = 2.4, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  # Protein dots
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 2, y = pred_prot, color = LRTI_adjudication),
    size = 2.4, alpha = 0.9
  ) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c("Definite" = "red", "No Evidence" = "#0072B2"),
    breaks = c("Definite", "No Evidence")
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = c(1, 2),
    labels = c("Gene", "Protein"),
    limits = c(0.7, 2.3)
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1)) +
  facet_wrap(~ LRTI_adjudication, ncol = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Classifier Prediction Shift: Gene vs. Protein Workflow",
    subtitle = "Dark lines = patients who switched classification at 0.5 threshold",
    x = NULL,
    y = "RF predicted P(LRTI)",
    color = "LRTI adjudication"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    text = element_text(family = "Helvetica", face = "bold"),
    axis.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold", size = 13),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

ggsave(
  file.path(results_dir, "gene_vs_protein_pred_shift.pdf"),
  width = 7, height = 5
)






```
